# bytebase_workload_identity_list (Data Source)

The workload identity data source list.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `parent` (String) The parent resource. Format: projects/{project} for project-level, workspaces/{workspace id} for workspace-level. Defaults to the workspace if not specified.
- `show_deleted` (Boolean) Show deleted workload identities if specified.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `workload_identities` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workload_identities))

<a id="nestedatt--workload_identities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workload_identities`

Read-Only:

- `create_time` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `title` (String)
- `workload_identity_config` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--workload_identities--workload_identity_config))

<a id="nestedobjatt--workload_identities--workload_identity_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workload_identities.workload_identity_config`

Read-Only:

- `allowed_audiences` (List of String)
- `issuer_url` (String)
- `provider_type` (String)
- `subject_pattern` (String)
